ABOUT.TITLE: About Me
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: I'm a passionate developer dedicated to creating innovative solutions. I specialize in building modern web applications with cutting-edge technologies.

description: Developed a Flutter/Dart mobile application for real-time monitoring of IoT sensors embedded in vehicle tires, supporting tire performance and condition tracking for mining sector operations
Led end-to-end development (front-end and back-end) of a React Native audio-streaming application, including audio playback, offline downloads, and user library management
Collaborated remotely with a cross-functional team using GitHub for version control, pull requests, code reviews, and branching strategy

ITEMS.company: Universidad Francisco de Paula Santander Seccional Ocaña — CIDIA
description: Maintained and configured Ubuntu Server with dockerized services in a microservices architecture for warehouse and datalake projects
Developed a Flutter mobile application for capturing images, audio, and video to feed the datalake backed by the server
Managed virtualization with Proxmox: created VMs, configured users and permissions
Handled SSH configuration, remote connections, and information security
Participated in requirements gathering and server administration
